name: ocrmypdf
description: A plugin that runs OCR on PDF and image files (JPEG, PNG, TIFF, BMP, GIF) using OCRmyPDF, extracting plain text as JSON output.

process.description: Run OCR on a PDF or image file and return extracted text.

filePath.description: Path to the PDF or image file to be processed. Supported MIME types: application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png, image/tiff, image/bmp, image/gif.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the input file. Must be one of: application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png, image/tiff, image/bmp, image/gif.

imageDpi.description: DPI to use when processing image inputs. Defaults to 300 if not provided.

ocrText.description: Full plain-text content extracted by OCR.

installed.description: Check if ocrmypdf is available on the system.
true if ocrmypdf is available, false otherwise.

install.description: Install ocrmypdf if not already available.

success.description: true if ocrmypdf is available after the installation attempt.

message.description: Human-readable status message describing the installation result.

convert.description: Convert an image file (JPEG, PNG, TIFF, BMP, GIF) to a searchable PDF using OCRmyPDF.

filePath.description: Path to the input image file. Supported MIME types: image/jpeg, image/png, image/tiff, image/bmp, image/gif.

outputPath.description: Path for the output PDF. If not specified, the PDF is placed next to the source file with a .pdf extension.

imageDpi.description: DPI to use when processing the image. Defaults to 300 if not provided.

outputPdf.description: Absolute path to the generated searchable PDF.

success.description: true if conversion succeeded, false otherwise.
